passed_names: CB — cancellation fee amount: inline answer, does NOT route info_pivot
CD — caller declines: silent wrap_up (CONFIRMATION REQUIRED DECLINED)
CF — caller confirms: smart_voice_agent with found_appointment_id (SILENT)
CR — confirmation_required: speaks message verbatim, waits (no tool)
E1 — normal cancel: STEP 1 fires immediately
F1 — entry: cue phrase + smart_voice_agent in SAME response
F2 — presence confirmation: 'Yes please' after filler is NOT wrap_up
F3 — 'Reschedule?' with empty reschedule_mode: maps to cancel flow
IP — info question before any cancel: silent info_pivot (SIGNAL 2)
MA — multiple appointments: reads FULL message verbatim, waits
NB — fresh new booking, no prior cancel: silent book_intent (SIGNAL 7)
NF — not found: asks if booking is under a different number
PW-C — policy warning confirmed: smart_voice_agent confirm_policy_override (SILENT)
PW-D — policy warning declined: 'No problem.' + wrap_up
RI — caller resists reschedule-first: explanation then proceeds to STEP 1
RO — reschedule orientation fires: phrase + cancel same response
SR — success with reschedule: message + cancellation_done (not wrap_up)
SX — success: message verbatim + wrap_up in same response
